text: Welcome to the community, helper_alex! You've been approved as a moderator. We're excited to have you on the team — please review the mod guidelines in #rules and don't hesitate to reach out if you have questions.
Hey guide_sam, welcome aboard! You've been approved as an event_helper. Check out #events for upcoming opportunities and introduce yourself whenever you're ready!
Welcome newbie_kim! Glad to have you as a member of the community. Feel free to explore the channels, say hi in #general, and ask questions anytime.
Welcome mentor_lina! You've been approved as a mentor — your experience will be a huge asset here. Check out #mentorship for guidelines and available mentees. Great to have you!
